reason: The tweet references 'Ansar al-Khilafah' and 'Jund al-Khilafah', which are known ISIS affiliates. It also mentions an ISIS leader in Algeria.
taxonomy_labels: Politics and Current Events -> Extremism and Radical Ideologies
